message:
feat(command): implement COMMAND GETKEYSANDFLAGS and fix SCAN count semantics

COMMAND GETKEYSANDFLAGS:
- Implement subcommand returning key positions with access flags
  (RO/RW, access, update) for Redis protocol compatibility

SCAN:
- Fix count semantics to count processed items (including filtered)
  rather than just matching results, ensuring consistent batch sizes

Tests:
- Add float_test.rs validating INCRBYFLOAT precision
- Add scan_test.rs validating SCAN count behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
